items.title: Hundreds arrested and dozens of police injured after Champions League riots in France
items.summary: Nearly 800 people were arrested after clashes with police which saw 219 people injured, including 57 police officers.
items.whyItMatters: It adds one useful signal to the current news mix without turning XLB into an overwhelming news feed.

items.title: Jammu and Kashmir CM calls MLAs meet on June 3
items.summary: Jammu and Kashmir Chief Minister Omar Abdullah calls a meeting of MLAs to discuss and deliberate upon the matters of collective importance and issues concerning public welfare

items.title: Middle East crisis live: Israeli army captures strategic castle in Lebanon in deepest incursion into country in 26 years
